<?php namespace Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Support\Laravel\Composer; class FakeComposer implements Composer { /** @return array<string, mixed> */ public function getClassMap(): array { return []; } /** @return array<string, mixed> */ public function getPrefixes(): array { return []; } /** @return array<string, mixed> */ public function getPrefixesPsr4(): array { return []; } }
